executable.title: GreedyReg_CLI
executable.description: Runs ITK-SNAP style Greedy affine registration for every matched T1/T2 (and optional mask/init) pair found in the given folders.

string.name: maskFolder
string.label: maskFolder
string.description: Optional folder containing masks (T1 space). Pass an empty string to disable masking.

string.name: initFolder
string.label: initFolder
string.description: Optional folder containing per-case "{patientId}_init.mat" initialization matrices. Cases without a matching file use identity initialization. Pass an empty string to always use identity.

string.name: metric
string.label: metric
string.description: Registration similarity metric: NMI, NCC or SSD

string.name: transformType
string.label: transformType
string.description: Degrees of freedom for the affine search: Rigid or Affine
